reason: Successfully tested browser-use feature by sending a browser navigation request to the agent, verifying it used browser tools to navigate to example.com and correctly reported the page title as "Example Domain"
steps: Step 1 - Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully navigated to the application home page. Page title is "Gamut" and the sidebar displays available agents.

Step 2 - Click on "QA-20260702-223537-0mzy" agent in sidebar — Successfully clicked on the agent link. The agent page loaded with the chat interface showing the agent name "QA-20260702-223537-0mzy" and session created with title "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check".

Step 3 - Send message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Successfully typed the message into the chat input field and clicked the Send message button. The message was posted to the chat interface.
Step 4 - Wait up to 3 minutes for response — Response received within approximately 12 seconds. The agent completed the task and returned the result.
